metadata.name: pwa2nx
metadata.description: Convert Progressive Web Apps (PWAs) and standard websites into native wrappers on the Nintendo Switch utilizing the internal NetFront NX WebKit applet.

file_tree.source: C source files and configurations for the Nintendo Switch wrapper
file_tree.source/main.c: Primary entry point of the Switch applet wrapper handling keyboard, profile, and WebKit launch
file_tree.source/updater.c: GitHub Release OTA self-updater using libcurl
file_tree.source/config.h: Auto-generated target URL and title configuration header
file_tree.source/icon.png: The 256x256 icon of the application packaged into the NRO
file_tree.scripts: Helper python scripts for build-time operations
file_tree.scripts/extract_pwa.py: Downloads PWA manifests, extracts/resizes icons, and writes C configuration headers
file_tree.scripts/version_manager.py: Manage semantic versioning across repository files
file_tree.scripts/generate_changelog.py: Deduplicate, filter, and categorize git logs into Markdown release notes
file_tree.scripts/preflight.py: Environment checks for make, icons, JSON configurations, and git tags
file_tree.tests/test_automation.py: Python unit tests validating release script automation logic
file_tree.Makefile: devkitPro compiler makefile configuring flags, libnx libraries, and compilation tasks
file_tree.app.json: Metadata structure for Homebrew App Store distribution compatibility
file_tree..github/workflows/build-and-release.yml: CI/CD pipeline triggering automated PWA extraction, NRO compilation, and GitHub Release generation
file_tree..github/workflows/ci.yml: CI workflow executing JSON validation, python ruff linting, cppcheck analysis, and unit tests
file_tree..github/workflows/rollback.yml: Revert tag and release trigger workflow for fallback cleanup
file_tree..github/workflows/labeler.yml: Automatic pull request labeling workflow based on file paths
file_tree..github/workflows/auto-reply.yml: Welcome greeting and manufacturer disclaimer auto-poster for issues and PRs
file_tree..gitignore: Standard exclusion file for build products, cache, and IDE configs
file_tree.requirements.txt: Core Python execution dependencies package file
file_tree.requirements-dev.txt: Development and quality checking Python dependencies package file
